---
name: Rule suggestion
about: Propose a new detection rule or improvement to an existing one
labels: rules, enhancement
---

## Use case

What are you trying to detect? Describe the real-world scenario where this rule would fire.

## Pattern

Provide the regex or matching logic you have in mind:

```
<pattern here>
```

If you don't have a pattern yet, describe what the input looks like structurally.

## Example inputs

Inputs this rule should match:

```
<example 1>
<example 2>
```

Inputs this rule should NOT match (to avoid false positives):

```
<example 1>
<example 2>
```

## Category

Which category does this rule belong to? (e.g. `prompt_injection`, `jailbreak`, `pii_extraction`, or a new one)

## Notes (optional)

Any ReDoS concerns, edge cases, or related rules to be aware of?
